ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "rule" TEXT /* The rule that was violated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component or file where the issue was found */,
  "line" INTEGER /* Line number where the issue occurs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the issue */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the issue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the issue */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the issue was resolved */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of how the issue was resolved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the issue */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash where the issue was found */,
  "pull_request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request if the issue is related to a specific PR */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the issue was found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_component FOREIGN KEY ("component") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_severity FOREIGN KEY ("severity") REFERENCES issue_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "project" TEXT /* Project to which the component belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the component */,
  "path" TEXT /* The full path to the component in the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project FOREIGN KEY ("project") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `code_issues` table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `users` table */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES code_issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `code_issues` table */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the issue at the time of the history entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action taken (e.g., resolved, re-opened) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the `users` table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES code_issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
